attributes.action: Exemptions for Carrying Bladed Weapons/any weapons in Public
attributes.additional_details: The UK does not allow members of the public to carry bladed articles/weapons on a person. This should be adhered to by everyone living within the UK regardless of religion
attributes.background:
No matter what your religion in this country we do not accept weapons being carried on a person. UK laws need to be respected and consequences must be had if these are not adhered to. 
2 tier policing must be abolished and the same rule for all

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: “Ban carrying religious, cultural & ceremonial bladed & pointed items in public” https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/770412
